title: tecoma pentaphylla
intro: Tecoma pentaphylla, also known as the Five-leaved Tecoma or African Yellow Bell, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids, which provide health benefits such as relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Tecoma pentaphylla are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions for treating various health conditions.
